commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces duplicated core OpenAI Codex OAuth login/refresh code with legacy wrappers that delegate to the OpenAI plugin provider auth/runtime hooks, updating focused tests.

PR surface: Source -599, Tests -442. Total -1041 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a refactor PR rather than a bug report. The current risk is source- and merge-tree-proven: the branch conflicts with current main in the Codex OAuth files.

target.title: refactor(openai): centralize Codex OAuth flow
target.body:
## Summary

- Make the OpenAI plugin OAuth runtime the canonical OpenAI Codex browser/token flow.
- Replace the duplicated core OAuth implementation and deprecated login shim with thin delegation to provider-owned hooks.
- Keep legacy `src/llm` OAuth login/refresh compatibility surfaces while removing the copied callback/token implementation.
- Provenance: duplicated OpenAI Codex OAuth flow was introduced by `bb46b79d3c14` (`refactor: internalize OpenClaw agent runtime`, #85341).

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/openai/openai-codex-oauth-flow.runtime.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/openai/openai-codex-provider.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugins/provider-openai-codex-oauth.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/llm/utils/oauth/openai-codex.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/auth-profiles/oauth.openai-codex-refresh-fallback.test.ts`
- `pnpm build`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/llm/utils/oauth/openai-codex.ts src/plugins/provider-openai-codex-oauth.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: OpenAI Codex OAuth implementation duplication between the bundled OpenAI plugin and legacy core OAuth helpers.
Real environment tested: Local macOS worktree with installed repo dependencies.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: The commands listed in Verification were run after the final code changes.
Evidence after fix: Focused OpenAI Codex OAuth, provider auth, compatibility, refresh fallback tests passed; `pnpm build` passed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: Legacy compatibility surfaces now delegate to provider-owned OpenAI Codex OAuth hooks, and the duplicated core browser/token implementation is removed.
What was not tested: Live OpenAI browser OAuth against real OpenAI credentials was not run.
target.author: romneyda
